pages.title: Carry Water
pages.text: Hand drinking is disabled. Fill a canteen instead. This pack allows canteens to fill without consuming the source block, so a protected water source can support a base.

pages.title: Canteen and Purifier
pages.text: Both standard crafting recipes are shown live. Keep an empty canteen; it is still useful long after you establish a purifier.

pages.title: Untreated Water
pages.text: A filled leather canteen is not the same as a purified one. You can get sick if you drink too much unpurified water.

pages.title: Water Purification
pages.text: Water bottle and filled-canteen purification is performed in the Water Purifier shown earlier. Place sand in its filter slot and the untreated container in the input slot; after a short cycle it returns purified water. Prefer it for routine travel: when thirst empties, sprinting and natural healing stop.
